subject: feat(charts): color repos by category — discontinued gray, internal white
body:
Add category-aware chart colors so repo status is visually clear:
- Discontinued repos (coin-zapp, plant-fur, chatty-chart) → gray
- Internal repos (tool-till-tees, glow-props, canva-grid-assets) → light gray
- Public-facing active repos → palette colors (sequential)

Added buildRepoColorMap() to chartColors.js as centralized logic.
Updated Timeline.jsx to use it for both Commit Activity and Lines
Changed charts.

Tags: ui, charts, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-ux
Semver: minor
